title: Verify Poly studio Settings
scenario: Verify all App Settings menu options are present and functional in Poly Studio Mobile app when launched as a guest
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest.
2. Tap the hamburger icon (☰) to open the App Settings menu.

3. Verify the following options are present under General settings:
   - Account
   - About
   - Notifications and Device Alerts
   - Privacy Policy
   - Licenses
4. Tap each General settings option and confirm it opens the corresponding screen or dialog.
5. Navigate back to the App Settings menu and tap Find My Device.
6. Confirm Find My Device screen loads and functions correctly.
7. Navigate back and tap User Guides (Onboarding).
8. Confirm the onboarding/user guide content is displayed.
10. Confirm the Support screen opens (e.g., links to help articles, contact info).
11. Navigate back and tap Color Theme.

12. Verify the following theme options are available:
    - Follow Phone Theme
    - Light Theme
    - Dark Theme
13. Select each theme option and confirm the app UI updates accordingly.
15. Confirm the Feedback screen opens (e.g., form, email, or rating prompt).
expected: All App Settings menu options (Account, About, Notifications and Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, Licenses, Find My Device, User Guides, Support, Color Theme with three sub-options, Feedback) are present, tappable, and functional — each opens the correct screen or performs the expected action.
